overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a highway overpass at dusk. The scene transitions from a graffiti-covered concrete structure to an open bridge with panoramic views of a futuristic city skyline, ending at a viewpoint with benches and street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway overpass sidewalk adjacent to concrete building

events.description: camera turns left to follow the highway direction, revealing the road and approaching vehicles
exits the building shadow area onto the open bridge with city skyline becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to the highway, passing graffiti-covered concrete walls

notable_agents.action: van driving past on the highway, headlights on

entered.detail: large concrete structure covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
multi-lane elevated highway with vehicles passing by
horizontal cyan neon light fixture mounted on the building facade
distant futuristic cityscape with tall buildings silhouetted against the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The segment begins beside a graffiti-covered concrete wall at dusk. The character walks along a highway overpass sidewalk, passing a building with a prominent cyan neon light. Vehicles drive past on the left as the camera moves from the semi-enclosed building area onto the open bridge, revealing the distant city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway bridge with panoramic city views

events.description: camera pans right to look over the concrete railing at the city skyline below
camera returns to forward-facing position to continue walking along the bridge

agents.ego_description: continuing along the bridge sidewalk with the city skyline visible to the right, occasionally glancing at the view

entered.detail: low concrete wall along the edge of the bridge separating sidewalk from the drop
tall street lights with warm illumination lining the highway
tall palm trees visible ahead along the bridge walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open highway bridge with an expansive view of the futuristic city skyline to the right. The camera briefly pans over the concrete railing to admire the view before continuing forward. Street lamps and palm trees line the path ahead while vehicles pass on the left. The dusk sky creates a dramatic backdrop with the city lights beginning to glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic viewpoint with benches and modern lighting

events.description: arriving at the viewpoint area where the sidewalk widens into a viewing platform with benches
slowing down and stopping near the street lamp where an NPC is standing

agents.ego_description: approaching the viewpoint area and slowing to a stop near a bench and illuminated street lamp

notable_agents.action: figure standing still near the street lamp at the viewpoint, facing the city

entered.detail: widened paved area serving as an observation deck with patterned concrete surface
tall dual-headed street lamps with bright white illumination and orange poles
simple concrete seating structure for viewing the cityscape

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at a scenic viewpoint where the bridge widens into an observation platform. Modern street lamps cast a warm glow on the concrete benches and palm trees. The highway traffic is now behind and to the left as the character approaches an NPC standing near a lamp post, overlooking the illuminated city skyline at dusk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a highway overpass that transforms from a gritty, enclosed urban corridor into an expansive scenic viewpoint overlooking a futuristic city. It begins beside a graffiti-covered concrete wall at dusk, moving past a building with a prominent cyan neon light as vehicles stream by on the left. As the camera leaves the semi-enclosed area, the scene opens onto a wide bridge where the view expands to reveal a glowing city skyline and a dramatic dusk sky. The camera briefly pans over the concrete railing to admire the horizon before continuing forward past palm trees and street lamps. Finally, the path widens into an observation platform with concrete benches, where the camera approaches an NPC standing under a warm lamp post overlooking the illuminated metropolis.
